title: armeria pseudarmeria subsp. monchiquensis
intro: Armeria pseudarmeria subsp. monchiquensis, also known as the Monchiquense thrift or armeria, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae. This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Armeria pseudarmeria subsp. monchiquensis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and combat infections. Armeria pseudarmeria subsp. monchiquensis is typically used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
